Information.Description: 2-(4-hydroxyphenyl)ethanol is a phenol substituted at position 4 by a 2-hydroxyethyl group. It has a role as a geroprotector, an antioxidant, a cardiovascular drug, an anti-arrhythmia drug, a protective agent, a plant metabolite and a fungal metabolite. It is functionally related to a 2-phenylethanol.
